name: Takada Corporation
summary: Takada Corporation, a general plant construction company, designs, procures, manufactures, constructs, and maintains industrial facilities in Japan and internationally. The company constructs steel manufacturing plants; oil/natural gas plants; nuclear energy plants; and environmental plants comprising waste and sewage treatment facilities, as well as designs, manufactures, and constructs equipment, machines, and piping work for chemical plants. It also provides engineering and plant diagnosis services. In addition, the company offers electronic equipment, including ultrasonic cutting, polish cut, single wafer wet processing, and batch process automated wafer cleaning systems, as well as dicing frame cleaners and IPA vapor dryers. Takada Corporation was founded in 1940 and is headquartered in Kitakyushu, Japan.
